name: agents-telegram-gateway
description: Telegram gateway for local coding agents. OpenCode adapter first, designed for Gentle-AI workflows.

scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @agents-telegram-gateway/core build && corepack pnpm --filter @agents-telegram-gateway/adapter-opencode build && corepack pnpm --filter @agents-telegram-gateway/transport-telegram build && corepack pnpm -r typecheck
